Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: main garments for the lower body [300209279], main garments [300209263], clothing [300266639], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: dresses (garments) [300046159], main garments [300209263], clothing [300266639], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]
costume components [300212998], components by specific context [300241584], components (objects parts) [300241583], Components (hierarchy name) [300241490], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Main garments of varying length extending from the waist or hip and covering a part of the lower body. Also, the lower part of a dress, coat, or other garment.

Prenda principal de varias longitudes que se extiende desde la cintura o cadera y que cubre una porción de la parte inferior del cuerpo. También, la parte más baja de un vestido, abrigo u otra prenda.
Bovenkledingstukken voor het onderlichaam, in verschillende lengtes vanaf de taille of heup. Ook het onderste gedeelte van een japon, jas of ander kledingstuk.

Hauptkleidungsstück, das in der Länge variieren kann und das sich von der Taille oder Hüfte erstreckt, um einen Teil des Unterkörpers zu bedecken. Ferner der untere Teil von einem Kleid, Mantel oder einem anderen Kleidungsstück.

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)

Term_Source.Page: illustration, Vol. 2, "Vocabulary of Basic Terms for Cataloguing Costume" - ICOM International Committee.
